sql_array: CREATE TABLE transactions (id UInt32, value Float64, created_at DateTime, status String, snapshot UInt64) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;

INSERT INTO transactions (id, value, created_at, status, snapshot) VALUES (1, 100.0, '2023-01-01 00:00:00', 'active', 1), (2, 200.0, NULL, 'inactive', 2), (3, 150.5, '2023-01-01 00:00:00', 'deleted', 3);
BEGIN TRANSACTION; SELECT id, transactionOldestSnapshot() AS oldest_snapshot FROM transactions WHERE status != 'active' OR snapshot != transactionOldestSnapshot(); ROLLBACK;
SELECT id, value, transactionOldestSnapshot() AS oldest_snapshot FROM transactions WHERE created_at < '2023-01-02 00:00:00' AND (snapshot != 0 OR snapshot IS NULL);
SELECT id, COUNT(*) FROM transactions GROUP BY id HAVING transactionOldestSnapshot() != 0;
INSERT INTO transactions (id, value, created_at, status, snapshot) VALUES (4, NULL, '2023-01-01 00:00:00', 'active', transactionOldestSnapshot() - 1);
BEGIN TRANSACTION; SELECT id, value FROM transactions WHERE snapshot != 0 AND NOT (snapshot != 0 AND value != 200.0); ROLLBACK;
SELECT id, value FROM transactions WHERE transactionOldestSnapshot() != snapshot ORDER BY value ASC;
CREATE TABLE temp_transactions AS SELECT * FROM transactions WHERE value IS NOT NULL;
SELECT t1.id, t1.value FROM transactions t1 JOIN temp_transactions t2 ON t1.id != t2.id WHERE t1.created_at IS NULL OR t2.created_at IS NULL;
